No wallet yet

Apply for a company wallet to pay salaries directly from DexwinPay. We’ll verify your business (KYB) first — it usually takes 1–2 working days.

Start verification
You’ll need your business registration, TIN and a director’s ID to complete KYB.

Verification in review

We’re reviewing your business documents. We’ll email you and update this page once your wallet is active — usually within 1–2 working days.
